title: lora_l2.c: LORA_DEV macro hides devicetree dependency
description:
Location: lora_l2.c:46

#define LORA_DEV DEVICE_DT_GET(DT_ALIAS(lora0))

The macro expands to a devicetree lookup but doesn't make clear that 'lora0' must be defined in the board's devicetree overlay.

What goes wrong: When porting to a new board, failure to define 'lora0' alias produces a cryptic linker error about undefined symbols from DEVICE_DT_GET. The macro name 'LORA_DEV' gives no hint about devicetree requirements.

Suggested fix: Add a comment: /* Requires 'lora0' alias in devicetree overlay */, or use BUILD_ASSERT with DT_NODE_EXISTS to produce a clear compile-time error.
close_reason: Already fixed: BUILD_ASSERT with DT_NODE_EXISTS now produces clear compile-time error when lora0 alias is missing
